ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., NPC, monster) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the character (e.g., epic, rare, none) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Armor points of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the character */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Detailed backstory of the character */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to the character's thumbnail image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npcs" (
  "npc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NPC */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that is an NPC */,
  "friendliness" INTEGER /* Friendliness level of the NPC */,
  "aggression" INTEGER /* Aggression level of the NPC */,
  "dialogue" TEXT /* Dialogue scripts of the NPC */,
  "quests_offered" TEXT /* Quests offered by the NPC */,
  "items_offered" TEXT /* Items offered by the NPC */,
  "last_interaction" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last interaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npcs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that is a monster */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength level of the monster */,
  "weakness" TEXT /* Weakness of the monster */,
  "drops" TEXT /* Items dropped by the monster */,
  "attack_patterns" TEXT /* Attack patterns of the monster */,
  "last_encounter" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last encounter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monsters_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location */,
  "danger_level" INTEGER /* Danger level of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "time_limit" TEXT /* Time limit to complete the quest */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites or requirements for the quest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest being assigned */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being assigned the quest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was started */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quest was completed */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts to complete the quest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_assignments_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_assignments_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "character_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the relationship */,
  "character_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the relationship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friendship, rivalry) */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the relationship */,
  "last_interaction" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last interaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_character_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id2") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_character_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id1") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "character_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the encounter */,
  "character_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the encounter */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning character */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the encounter */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the encounter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_encounters_character_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id2") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_encounters_character_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id1") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Rarity of the character (e.g., epic, rare, none)
URL to the character's thumbnail image
ID of the character that is an NPC
ID of the character that is a monster
Time limit to complete the quest

ID of the character being assigned the quest
Status of the assignment (e.g., in progress, completed)
Timestamp when the quest was started
Timestamp when the quest was completed

ID of the second character in the relationship

ID of the second character in the encounter
Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer)
